code:
sequenceDiagram Note over Content timeline: [Infra_RedisCache]] is null
[Infra_WorkerNode]] is null Note over Device timeline: [Infra_EtcdCluster]].[Infra_EtcdCluster]] is "available" Content timeline ->> Device timeline: mapAsync(Infra_IngressController) Note over Content timeline: [Infra_IngressController]] is null
[Infra_RedisCache]] is non-null Note over Device timeline: [Infra_WorkerNode]].[Infra_IngressController]] is "unavailable" Device timeline ->> Content timeline: mapAsync(Infra_IngressController) response Note over Device timeline: [Infra_IngressController]].[Infra_IngressController]] is "unavailable" Note over Content timeline: [Infra_IngressController]] is non-null
[Infra_EtcdCluster]] is null Content timeline ->> Device timeline: unmap(Infra_WorkerNode) Note over Content timeline: [Infra_RedisCache]] is null
[Infra_RedisCache]] is null Note over Device timeline: [Infra_WorkerNode]].[Infra_WorkerNode]] is "available"

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个时序图，展示Content timeline和Device timeline之间的资源映射过程。核心场景是：IngressController的可用性变化，以及WorkerNode和EtcdCluster的状态联动。
明白。我先确认一下初始状态：Content timeline这边RedisCache和WorkerNode都是null，Device timeline的EtcdCluster是available状态，对吗？
对，然后Content timeline发起mapAsync调用，把IngressController映射过去。这时候Content这边IngressController变成非null，RedisCache保持非null，但Device那边WorkerNode标记IngressController为unavailable。
好，我画上了Content timeline到Device timeline的mapAsync箭头，标注了Infra_IngressController。两边的Note也补上了状态变化。接下来是Device返回response？
是的，response回来之后，Device timeline的IngressController自身状态变成unavailable。然后Content这边需要做一次unmap，把WorkerNode释放掉，因为EtcdCluster已经变成null了。
unmap之后Content timeline的状态是RedisCache两次都是null？这里重复了，是要强调什么吗？
啊，我写错了，第二个应该是Infra_WorkerNode。unmap操作后，Content这边WorkerNode和RedisCache都清空，Device那边WorkerNode恢复为available。
已修正。现在完整流程是：初始状态→mapAsync调用→状态变化→response返回→IngressController unavailable→unmap释放WorkerNode→最终Device的WorkerNode恢复available。图已经画好了，你看还有要调整的吗？
